summary: Cells undergoing necroptosis exhibit disruption of their cell membranes, specifically via MLKL-induced pore formation in the plasma membrane, resulting in membrane rupture and cell lysis. This confirmed mechanical basis supports option A. \boxed{A}

This confirmed mechanical basis supports option A. \boxed{A}. Answer choice: A
